Dialog.name: MSG_715_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}These two are serious... But I know you can do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 1 211}Now then... It is time for your judgment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 1 211}It appears you have more than just luck on your side... So be it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_4_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 1 211}Fighting others with the same power... And what difficult opponents they are...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 1 211}Look at how you squander your potential... It's beyond comprehension.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_5_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 1 211}Ugh... So this is the true ability of such a favored Persona-user...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_7_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 1 212}You guys just don't know when to quit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_8_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 1 212}Alright, that's enough of a warmup. It's time for the real deal![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_9_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 1 212}I've never had to fight this hard before... You guys sure are trouble![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_10_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 1 212}Damn... These guys are tougher than I thought![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_12_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 12 0 6}...!? They can coordinate their attacks too!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 13 0 6}Try not to let them target your weaknesses![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_13_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}I figured this wouldn't be easy... Stay sharp, everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_13_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Like hell we're gonna get beaten by these guys![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_14_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Are you mad? Well so are we![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_14_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}That's one down. Let's keep going![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_715_15_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}One target suppressed![n]{f 1 1}
